rationale: Educ. Code §37.110 concerns gang-free zone information in student handbooks. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: The superintendent of each public school district and the administrator of each private elementary or secondary school located in the public school district shall ensure that the student handbook for each campus in the public school district includes information on gang-free zones and the consequences of engaging in organized criminal activity within those zones.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no cross-reference or dependency exists between the two provisions.
